hero.label: The #1 Video Editing Agency for Infopreneurs
hero.subtitle:
Delegating your video editing shouldn't be a headache.
You film with your phone, we handle the production. Get 40h back every month to scale your brand.

portfolio.label: OUR WORK
portfolio.subtitle: Discover how our short-form content expertise transforms raw footage into subscriber magnets. We edit to hold attention, not just to cut clips.

freelance.label: WHY US?
freelance.f2: You waste time briefing every single clip.
freelance.f3: Turnaround times that slip without warning.
freelance.f4: One single creative vision for all your content.
freelance.f6: You spend your time chasing your own files.
freelance.i1: A dedicated editing team, ready 5 days a week.
freelance.i2: We learn your style once, then repeat it forever.
freelance.i3: Guaranteed delivery every week, no exceptions.
freelance.i4: An editor + production manager duo on your account.
freelance.i5: Flat monthly fee, no hidden costs or surprises.
freelance.i6: You drop your footage and forget the technique.
freelance.arg1_desc: Your content is ready when you need it. No more last-minute stress before publishing.
freelance.arg2_desc: We master your fonts, pacing, and style from day one. Zero repeated briefs required.
freelance.arg3_desc: From raw footage to sound design and captions. We manage the entire production chain for you.

eco.label: THE ECOSYSTEM
eco.subtitle: We've built the system every creator dreams of. You remain the face of your brand, we become your invisible production facility.
eco.card1_desc: The fastest review interface on the market. Comment directly on the timeline, we adjust in real-time. Zero emails, zero friction.
eco.card2_desc: Live production tracking. Centralized editorial calendar, scripts, and strategy. You always know exactly where each video stands.
eco.card3_desc: A direct line to your editors. A question? A creative emergency? We reply instantly. We are part of your core team.

process.label: HOW IT WORKS
process.subtitle: We've removed everything that makes delegation complex. Here is how we will transform your daily life as an entrepreneur.
process.row1_toi_sub: Just pick up your phone. Speak. That's all we ask.
process.row1_irys_sub: Installation of your Slack, Notion, and Frame.io in 24h.
process.row2_toi_sub: Upload your raw footage in 30 seconds. No long briefs.
process.row2_irys_sub: Cuts, motion design, and immersive sound design.
process.row3_toi_sub: Need a change? Click the timeline and type your comment.
process.row3_irys_sub: Your video is ready to conquer the algorithm and your audience.
process.row4_toi_sub: A single click is all it takes for the final green light.
process.row4_irys_sub: Automated publishing and SEO optimization on your socials.
process.bilan_irys_sub: Unlock 40h of your life every month
process.step1_sub: No pro setup needed. Your expertise is the only true value. We handle the premium packaging.
process.step2_sub: High-pacing editing, impactful branding, and optimized retention. We make sure your message is heard to the end.
process.step3_sub: Zero useless back-and-forth. An intuitive feedback system to get the perfect result in record time.
process.step4_sub: We schedule your videos at peak times to maximize visibility on Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube.

booking.label: TAKE ACTION
booking.subtitle: Book a free strategic session with a video editing expert. We analyze your brand and define your roadmap.
booking.team_subtitle: We are not just an agency; we are your strategic co-pilots.
booking.kilian_bio: The brain behind 1.7M views in record time. He knows exactly how to turn a simple idea into must-watch viral content.
booking.quentin_bio: A successful infopreneur who knows the ropes. He manages your production so you never have to worry about technique again.
booking.first_video_title: Your first video is on us.
booking.first_video_desc: Send us a raw clip. We show you our magic. If you're not blown away, walk away with the video — no hard feelings.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.a1: Yes, 100%. We define your brand visual DNA together at kick-off. Nothing is published without your final 'OK' on Frame.io. You stay in charge of your brand image.
faq.q2: Do I need to invest in expensive gear?
faq.a2: Absolutely not. An iPhone and natural lighting are enough to make high-converting videos. Your expertise is 10x more important than your camera.
faq.a3: No one controls the algorithm, but we control retention. Our edits are built to keep people watching. High watch time = high exposure.
faq.q4: How do I get my free video?
faq.a4: It's simple: drop a raw file on our platform. We edit it according to your style. You judge the result. It's the best way to test our quality and speed.
faq.a5: None. You can cancel your subscription with a 30-day notice. We want you to stay for the results, not because of a contract.
faq.cta: More questions? Ask us directly during our call.

footer.tagline: The video editing agency that turns your time into growth.
